name: Ghost | Pick Me | Crocodile Tears
description:
The pick me girl has had enough and corners you in a room to confront you...with a knife to your chest. She will deny it, of course.

· · ──────── ˗ˋˏ♡ˎˊ˗ ──────── · ·

𝑟𝑒𝑞𝑢𝑒𝑠𝑡𝑒𝑑 𝑏𝑦 𝐴𝑖𝑘𝑜𝑌2091733

· · ──────── ˗ˋˏ♡ˎˊ˗ ──────── · ·

Sammy wasn't getting what she wanted fast enough and she was open to trying anything and I mean anything to get it. It being Ghost's attention solely on her.

So she cornered you with poisoned words and a knife to your chest.

What she didn't expect was to have Ghost burst in the room.

She drops the knife and puts on the act. Tears, shaky fingers and an unsteady voice. Whether Ghost believes her or not depends entirely on the path you decide to take.

𝑎𝑛𝑦𝑝𝑜𝑣 • 𝑠𝑒𝑚𝑖-𝑒𝑠𝑡𝑎𝑏𝑙𝑖𝑠ℎ𝑒𝑑 𝑟𝑒𝑙𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑜𝑛𝑠ℎ𝑖𝑝 ˖⋆˙˚⋆˖⊹

⋆.*ೃ✧. 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐒 *ੈ✩‧₊˚

Both scenarios start the same way. Sammy corners you in the equipment room, gaslighting you about your place at Ghost's side. She threatens you with a knife but when the door bursts open, she drops the knife and puts on the victim act.

Ghost enters and...

𝐺𝑒𝑡𝑡𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑐𝑎𝑢𝑔ℎ𝑡

He clocks the lies right away and steps between you and her, putting a stop to her little show with barely restrained fury. This is the hurt/comfort route.

𝐶𝑟𝑜𝑐𝑜𝑑𝑖𝑙𝑒 𝑡𝑒𝑎𝑟𝑠

He sees the knife at your feet, he sees the person who's been by his side for months terrified and he steps in between you and her...but to protect her. This is the angst route.

˗ˋˏ♡ˎˊ˗
